column1: # Owner: Jane. Trigger: weapon at level 8 + paired passive OWNED (level >= 1), then OPEN A CHEST.
# The gate used to require the passive at level 8 too. Simulated it: a player who
# rushed Chain->8 then Might->8 and took NOTHING else evolved on 1 of 3 seeds, at
# 18:50. The payoff moment of the run was unreachable. The weapon is the
# commitment; the passive is the key. Evolutions should land at 12:00-15:00.
# Chests drop from elites. The evolved weapon replaces the base one in the same slot.
# This is the payoff moment of the run: flash the screen white for one frame.

column5: bands on BOTH sides, always, no facing check
the ring ignites the floor it passes over
8 motes; they orbit outward and return
